comment: SUR-842 native-parity coverage manifest. One row per registered sync behavior in vendored/native-parity/sync-surface.json (the SUR-845 registry snapshot vendored from surfc/main). Source of truth for 'is this behavior accounted for natively'. status: core (handled in the shared braird-core layer, inherited by all native clients) | ios | android | waived. A waived row REQUIRES a non-empty note; a non-waived row REQUIRES a ticket (SUR-nnn). scripts/check-native-parity.mjs enforces one row per registered id (and no orphans) against surfc/main. Seed proposed from the port tickets 2026-07-11; ratify the RATIFY-flagged rows.

entries.note: Core sync engine — outbox flush-before-pull (SUR-659 / SUR-724 outbox push).
Core sync engine — incremental change_seq pull + LWW merge (SUR-659 / SUR-725).
Core post-pull reconciliation — fetch books a live note references but the pull did not deliver.
Core post-pull reconciliation — rehome notes off merged-away books onto the survivor.
Core post-pull reconciliation — dropped canon leaf -> user-scoped custom idea (SUR-597 behavior, homed to core in SUR-820).
Image + ink-crop download/cache for imagePath/inkCropPath notes (SUR-768; reconciliation moved to core SUR-820). RATIFY: core vs per-platform (SUR-768 was scoped 661h/Android) and ink-crop parity.
Core sync engine — decrypt-on-read reload so app state holds plaintext.
Core sync engine — advance per-table change_seq cursors after a clean pull (SUR-739).
Content-tag self-heal/derivation is core (SUR-835 retroactive dedup); the exact-duplicate merge-PROMPT UI half is client-surface, deferred to SUR-759 / SUR-819.
Core reconciliation helper — same behavior as the preserve-dropped-tags step (SUR-597 -> core SUR-820).

Client-initiated book-merge UI action; native clients converge on its SYNCED effects (soft-deleted losers, rehomed notes, merge map) via core post-pull reconciliation (SUR-820). Per-platform merge UI deferred to SUR-759 / SUR-819. RATIFY: waiver vs a native merge-UI port ticket.
Client-initiated undo-merge UI; synced effects converge via core reconciliation (SUR-820). Per-platform UI deferred to SUR-759 / SUR-819. RATIFY: waiver vs port ticket.

Client-initiated note-merge UI; synced effects (edge + collection-membership rehome) converge via core reconciliation (SUR-820). Per-platform UI deferred to SUR-759 / SUR-819. RATIFY: waiver vs port ticket.
Core post-pull reconciliation helper backing the rehome-stranded-notes step.
Core sync engine — LWW cloud->local merge across the 8 synced tables (SUR-659 / SUR-725).

note_signals birth-row writer (SUR-615). note_signals ROWS sync and are received via core merge-cloud-records; native signal COLLECTION (writing signals on interaction) is not yet ported. RATIFY: waiver vs a note_signals native-collection port ticket.
note_signals exposure-recency writer (SUR-615); native signal collection not yet ported — received via core merge-cloud-records. RATIFY: waiver vs port ticket.

note_signals hasAnnotation reconciler vs live note_links edges (SUR-615); native signal collection not yet ported — received via core merge-cloud-records. RATIFY: waiver vs port ticket.
note_signals stitch-spawn writer (SUR-615); native signal collection not yet ported — received via core merge-cloud-records. RATIFY: waiver vs port ticket.
note_signals tombstone-on-note-delete writer (SUR-615); native signal collection not yet ported — received via core merge-cloud-records. RATIFY: waiver vs port ticket.
